description: Unit tests for the Popover component, covering version info, default configurations, show/hide behaviors, method interfaces, and instance management.

classes.name: Popover
classes.description: Main class implementing the popover component behavior with methods for showing, hiding, and managing instances.

methods.name: show
methods.description: Displays the popover attached to the element.

methods.name: hide
methods.description: Hides the popover attached to the element.

methods.name: setContent
methods.description: Sets the content of the popover, usually updating the DOM elements for header and body.

methods.name: getInstance
methods.description: Retrieves the existing popover instance associated with a DOM element.

methods.name: getOrCreateInstance
methods.description: Returns an existing popover instance or creates a new one with optional configuration.

methods.name: jQueryInterface
methods.description: jQuery plugin interface for creating or manipulating popover instances through jQuery.
